## How to test
1. Build: `dotnet build`
2. Run tests: `dotnet test`

## Checklist
- [ ] Build succeeds locally and in CI
- [ ] Unit tests pass locally and in CI
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests or documented
- [ ] Dependency changes are intentional and safe
- [ ] README/TODO updated if public behavior changed
